titleStmt.title: SII 39.183: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 183. (A.R. No. 183 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL, TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN VIKRAMPĀṆḌYA DĒVA-8TH YEAR (13TH CENTURY A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription mentions the gift of the village Paḍuvūr alias Vīrachampanallūr in Paḍuvūr kōṭṭam to the temple of Emberumāṉ Vijayarāghava perumāḷ, at Tiruppuṭkuḻi for celebrating the festival of Āvaṇi Tirunāḷ and conducting the service of Vīrachampaṉśandi, (which was instituted) by one Sambukulōttuṅga-sambuvarāyaṇ Vīrachampaṉ in the temple on the constellation of Ayiliyam which was his natal star.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī grāmādāmu taṇṭalāt prathamadaśyāham gukanāmataḥ pratyaka daśyadhisa tāthanaddaśyā khegavatyāstatiyāmyā yāndaśi bhura caḷava
grāmāt pagugrāmataḥ pradādābhava puṅgavāya vijayi śrī vīracamṭeśvaraḥ koccaṭa koppatmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrī vikramapāṇḍyadevaṟku yāṇ
ṭu Eṭṭāvatu kaṉṉināyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Āyiliyattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattup paṭuvūṟ
koṭṭattup paṭuvūrāṉa viracampanallūr kiḻpāṟkellai ṉikaḷ taṇṭalattār Ellaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai vaḷavanallūr Ellaikku vaṭakkum
melpāṟkellai peruṅkāyanallūr Ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai veḵ kāvāṟṟukku teṟkum Āka Inta nāṟpāṟ kellaikkum naṭuviṭpaṭṭa nilattil Iṟai
yili tevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam paḷḷiccantam muḷḷiṭṭa nilaṅkaḷ nikki nikkiyuḷḷa naṉcey puṉcey nilattu kaṭamaiāyam poṉvari kutiraivari pala kāṇikkai puṟakka
laṉai taṟiiṟai taṭṭārpāṭṭam cekkukaṭamai Iṉavari Erimiṉpāṭṭam Iruntu parimāṟuvār periṟkaṭamai maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Aṉaittu varikaḷum Inta toṇ
ṭai maṇṭalattut tāmaṟkoṭṭattut tāmarnāṭṭut tiruppati tiruppuṭkuḻi Emperumāṉ vijayarāghavap perumāṉukku nām nammuṭaiya nakṣatramāṉa Āyiliyattile tir
tdhamāka kaṇṭa Āvaṇittirunāḷukku tirunāḷ paṭikkum nāṅkaṇṭa viracāmpaṉ sandhikku Amutupaṭi kala Aricikkum Itukku veṇṭum ciṟiviñcaṉaṅkaḷukkum tiruppalitrattukkum
periya tirumañcaṉattukkum veṇṭuvaṉa candrāditta varaikkum celvatākac cilā lekaiyum tāmraśāsanamum paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ campukulottuṅkaṉ campuvarāyaṉ
viracampaṉeṉ § campaścampū kulottuṅga ssārvvabhauma sabhāpatiḥ bhrātu bhissa harājyasthovi bhātyā candratāraka
Digital edition of SII 39.183 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
